text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
20 
FRMLRY_RX_ID 
LABEL: 
CCW Formulary Drug Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is a CCW-created identifier for a drug product that is found in a Part D prescription drug 
plan's formulary. 
Part D Plans submit their formularies to CMS and identify drug products using the National Library of 
Medicine RxNorm Concept Unique Identifiers (RXCUIs). 
There can
